positive: A minimalist, stylized portrait of a celestial sloth hanging from a crescent moon. The sloth is rendered with clean, thick line art and vibrant color blocking, contrasting against a deep indigo nebula background dotted with geometric constellations and glowing pastel nebula clouds. Use a 'vintage astronomical blueprint' style mixed with modern flat design. The overall composition should be centralized, ensuring a striking silhouette and high contrast suitable for screen printing on apparel. Emphasize intricate scientific diagram elements and subtle celestial patterns.
